The Moon, full or in conjunction with the Sun (on New
Moon day) being conjoined with and (or) aspected by benches,
promotes immediately the prices of articles belonging to the parti-
cular Sign occupied by her. Similarly, the Sun conjoined with and
(or) aspected by malefics, destroys the prices of commodities
belonging to that Sign. Thus should one make predictions, good
and bad, regarding the price of materials, having duly comprehend-
ed the objects belonging to the several Signs of the Zodiac.
[It is understood here that the prices will slump down, if the
Moon in either situation is conjoined with or aspected by
malefics.
